hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in ""|*"/delightstack/"*|*"/.svelte-kit/"*|*"/build/"*|*"/node_modules/"*|*"/.wrangler/"*|*"/.vercel/"*|*"/static/"*|*"/media/"*|*"/legacy-content/"*|*"/.claude/"*) exit 0;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.svelte|*.json|*.jsonc|*.css|*.html|*.md|*.yaml|*.yml) node_modules/.bin/oxfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; }
